islands.name: Credit Kingdom
islands.description: Master credit scores, loans, and debt management. Locked until you complete Asset Island.

learning_objectives: Understand how credit scores are calculated
Learn responsible borrowing and debt management
Compare loan types: secured vs unsecured, fixed vs variable
provenance.originality_notes: Theme: medieval kingdom metaphor for credit system (not a bank sim). Verb: quest-based debt challenges + NPC mentorship (not spreadsheet tracking). Structure: story-driven progression through credit concepts (not competitive). Combines debt-elimination strategy with dialogue exploration.

areas.name: Kingdom Gate
areas.description: The grand gate to Credit Kingdom. More content coming soon!
